Question, a team with Winkle, Tinct, Thais and Jenkin would work well? I saw that Winkle works well with Sanga, so also were thinking about Winkle, Sanga, Tinct and Murphy (I don't have murphy so I would have to save for her)
The idea of Sanga-Murphy is curious, but it would be a very defensive team. At least Winkle would help charge Sanga's Exalt quickly, but there's still something missing from that team
As for the first question, it's not a bad idea. You can try it and tell us what you think <:pray:1356053116260454534>
is there anywhere like a 'training ground' to test teams? also what do you think it is missing?
Well, to test equipment I use Inmersion
which posse do you suggest with each?

And since this is a team I haven't tested, I'll assume the biggest problem you'll have will be constant shield generation but a difficulty in always having them. At least Murphy can help a little, but you would also be playing at the limit with his Sacrifice and the lack of ability to restore life
where is it? xD sorry I'm quite new in the game
In Interlude
ahhh for me it says Phantasmal Dive
Oh
Well. It wasn't that bad.

As you might have seen, I failed to use Murphy's 3-cost spell on the ultra turn. Had I used it, Sanga and Murphy's Exalts would have had them to take advantage of all the shield I had gathered and that Sanga was going to hit a bomb with damage. But it didn't happen. My mistake.
At least I was pleased that my initial hypothesis was slightly wrong. Still, life is still something to be very careful about
Not a bad idea. It was fun.

okay, thanks for testing it for me, I don't have murphy so couldn't really test it, and Tinct is like a rng wheel after using her awakened card since she can get any effect in any of her cards, it feels nice when she gets the gain arithmetic in the additional effects, but she also usually get good amount of shields there as well
Yes. I liked the team.

Sometimes I try out teams that others come up with, or most of the time I'm the one who gets very experimental. Either way, I like to experiment whenever I can. And it's more effective when other players don't have the characters or wheels. In this sense, I like to test how right their ideas are or where they fail and need to improve.
